combined_memory.rule: A memory-representation candidate needs mean cosine >=0.95 and lower effective bps than always-INT4 refresh on the same held-out layer, and it must not be rate-quality dominated by standalone raw PQ, residual PQ, or scalar quantization. It is not automatically a compute-saving point.

conditional_compute.rule: A conditional-compute candidate additionally needs encoder_required_rate = innovation_rate + refresh_rate <0.30. Innovation coding requires the current hidden state and therefore does not skip the visual encoder.

end_to_end_task.rule: Requires a streaming Video-LLM task benchmark.

logic_controller.rule: DLGN enters the provisional Pareto set only when test balanced accuracy is within 0.02 of MLP, its static description is smaller, and validation soft-hard gap is at most 0.02.

predictor.rule: Fourier is positive only when validation-selected Fourier beats the validation-selected simple causal predictor on test NMSE.

residual_vq.rule: Residual VQ is retained when matched full-PQ index entropy falls by more than 30%, or when it improves held-out distortion at a comparable reported stream rate. This probe does not test task accuracy.
